findings: The approved Task-008 spec exists and explicitly defines the added top-level metadata and row-level stock-report fields.
Implementation in `src/tw_quant/workflows.py` adds the expanded technical, ATR/true-range, candle/volume, and Qizhang analysis fields while preserving prior report fields.
Implementation in `src/tw_quant/runner.py` updates CSV field lists so expanded stock-report rows are preserved in direct exports and grouped strategy-improve stock-report CSVs.
Regression coverage in `tests/test_tw_quant_stock_report_contracts.py` validates new JSON/CSV fields, and related runner tests remain green.
summary: T22 satisfies the approved stock-report expansion scope and preserves existing behavior.
